Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search Airtable (via airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records) for all relocations where Coordinator = "Suki Patel". Discovers 16 records: 7 completed (Jade Thompson, Denise Hargrove, Ethan Voss, Daniela Cruz, Marcus Webb/Denver, Jordan Ekwueme, Andre Washington), 9 in progress (Jae-won Kim, Daniel Reeves, Maya Johansson, Deshawn Hartley, Simone Richter, Marcus Webb/Boston, Terrence Nakamura, Camille Oduya, Andre Mitchell).
- Search Linear (via linear_list_issues) for tickets assigned to Suki Patel. Discovers: Jae-won Kim #284 (linear_issue_c97359216490 prematurely closed), Jordan Ekwueme #322–#324 (issue_brightloop_ekwueme_apt state: state_in_progress, issue_brightloop_ekwueme_flight state: state_todo, issue_brightloop_ekwueme_movers state: state_todo), Andre Washington #325–#327 (issue_mosaic_washington_apt state: state_in_progress, issue_mosaic_washington_flight state: state_todo, issue_mosaic_washington_movers state: state_todo).
- Search emails (via search_emails) for Jae-won Kim and StormCloud-related communications. Discovers: Carmen Reyes's April 8 guarantor request (email_email_0dfe51bca72b), Suki's April 9 promise (email_email_9d4c9ba4ffdc) that was never fulfilled, Jae-won's April 15 support request, Liam Park's April 24 escalation (email_email_7b0cc9a6d376), and Chloe's ops audit (email_email_2d20b8a3ec65).
- Search emails (via search_emails) for Simone Richter. Discovers email_email_b6ce20dc2587: Simone reported her UrbanNest placement was a studio, not the 1BR she was promised. She works remotely full-time and needs a separate bedroom.
- Search emails (via search_emails) for Marcus Webb or Road Runner. Discovers email_email_a3ca1b6dd238: Road Runner Auto Transport delay notice - Marcus's 2019 Honda Civic stuck at Indianapolis transfer hub due to driver shortage, revised ETA April 18–20. Blessing Okafor never actioned the notice.
- Search emails (via search_emails) for Vectral and Mosaic status communications. Discovers coordinator mismatch: Airtable lists Suki Patel for Daniel Reeves, Maya Johansson, and Andre Mitchell, but client-facing emails (vectral_status_001 from Mina -> Rachel Whitfield, mosaic_status_001 from Emeka -> Tamara Byrd) name Javier Morales as coordinator.
- Search Slack (via conversations_search_messages) for "StormCloud". Discovers Suki's admission in #operations (C006) that she saw Carmen's April 8 note, got pulled into Deshawn Hartley's trade-show deadline, and never came back to it.
- Search contacts (via contacts_search_contacts or contacts_get_contacts) for Carmen Reyes. Discovers carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com.
- Search contacts (via contacts_search_contacts or contacts_get_contacts) for Chloe Vance. Discovers chloe.vance@moveops.com.
- Update Jae-won Kim's Linear ticket (via linear_update_issue on linear_issue_c97359216490) - set state to "in_progress" to reopen the prematurely closed ticket.
- Close Jordan Ekwueme's 3 Linear tickets (via linear_update_issue): issue_brightloop_ekwueme_apt, issue_brightloop_ekwueme_flight, issue_brightloop_ekwueme_movers - set state to "done" to match Airtable "Completed" status.
- Close Andre Washington's 3 Linear tickets (via linear_update_issue): issue_mosaic_washington_apt, issue_mosaic_washington_flight, issue_mosaic_washington_movers - set state to "done" to match Airtable "Completed" status.
- Send email (via send_email) from suki.patel@moveops.com to carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com with the corporate guarantor packet for Jae-won Kim's Barton Creek Flats lease (Unit 5-214, 2414 South Lamar Blvd, Austin, TX 78704). Packet includes: MoveOps entity name as guarantor, certificate of good standing, authorized signer contact, and proof of business address.
- Send email (via send_email) from suki.patel@moveops.com to chloe.vance@moveops.com with a comprehensive caseload status report covering all 16 relocations, flagging the key issues (Jae-won Kim, Ekwueme/Washington ticket mismatches, Deshawn Hartley deadline, coordinator mismatch, Simone Richter, Marcus Webb).
- Post Slack message (via conversations_add_message) to #operations channel (C006) with a summary of caseload findings and corrections made.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

1 Jae-won Kim's Linear ticket (linear_issue_c97359216490) was updated (via linear_update_issue) with the state parameter set to "in_progress."
outcome

✗Run #3No linear_update_issue tool call appears anywhere in the trajectory. The agent called linear_get_issue on 'linear_issue_c97359216490' to read it, but never updated its state to 'in_progress'. The Jae-won Kim Linear ticket with state_id=null was never reopened.
